• Business opportunity: There is potential for investment in AI-driven drug discovery and partnerships with pharmaceutical companies.

items.title: Show HN: Mcpify – Turn any REST API into an MCP server in one command
items.rawTextSnippet: Wiring an existing API into MCP means hand-writing a tool wrapper per endpoint. Almost every API has an OpenAPI spec, so mcpify just reads it and generates the whole server. Built it because I kept doing this by hand. Feedback welcome.

dailyBrief: In a groundbreaking development, a basement inventor has utilized AI to create a potential treatment for Alzheimer's disease, highlighting the transformative power of technology in healthcare innovation. Meanwhile, the proposed Kids Online Safety Act aims to enforce age verification for minors accessing the internet, which could significantly impact digital marketing strategies and compliance costs for tech companies. On the hardware front, AMD has released a guide for setting up its Strix Halo RDMA cluster, which could enhance performance for AI applications, while the Wayfinder Router promises to optimize query routing for local and hosted large language models, potentially improving efficiency in AI deployments. Lastly, a historical analysis of the school system reveals its original intent to foster independent, critical thinkers, underscoring the ongoing need for educational reform in an increasingly automated world.
